title: Implement Python step definitions for interoperability tests
description: The new interoperability feature files (comments, delete, dependency, label, update) have 46 scenarios that are erroring because they're missing Python step implementations in python/features/steps/. Need to add step definitions for: creating issues with various attributes, running commands in both Beads and Kanbus modes, and verifying interoperability across modes.
creator: ryan.porter
